changes: Register pivot_and_redirect.md skill in agent config so deflection pivots are active
Add explicit interaction and content question templates to taxonomy skill
Update long-term memory with coverage-priority and deflection-pivot guidance
evolver_rationale: The biggest regressors are oracle deflections without pivots (3 occurrences) and low interaction/content coverage (0.39/0.33). The pivot_and_redirect skill existed but was never registered in code_agent.yaml, so the agent never saw it. Adding it activates deflection pivots. The taxonomy lacked concrete question templates for the specific subtypes being missed (customer service, login, responsive design), so the agent defaulted to implementation-detail questions that yielded zero hits. Long-term memory now reinforces coverage-gap tracking and deflection-pivot behavior to reduce drilling on deflected topics.
